message:
fix(channel): remove redundant send_waker drain in SendPermit::send on disconnected receiver

When send() detected receiver_dropped, it drained and woke all
send_wakers before returning Disconnected. But Receiver::drop already
drains and wakes all pending send_wakers, so this was double-work
that also held the inner lock longer than necessary.

Remove the drain+wake block and just drop the lock, relying on the
Receiver::drop path for waker cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
